failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_003: Notes the correct count — 3 pending B&T matters vs. 2 disclosed
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo identifies that there are 3 pending arbitrations involving Barrow & Thistlewood (this matter, Orion Fabrication, and Halcyon Biotech) but Fairhaven only disclosed 2 of them (or listed only 7 total prior/pending matters when there should have been 8). FAIL if the discrepancy in count is not noted.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_009: Raises prejudgment risk from subject matter expertise combined with CLE
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo discusses the risk that Fairhaven may have pre-formed views on key legal issues in this arbitration, based on the combination of her subject matter credentials (LL.M. in IP or Technology Case Management panel membership) and her CLE co-panelist appearance on the topic of IP licensing disputes in arbitration. FAIL if the memo does not raise the prejudgment or pre-formed views concern.

failed_criteria.title: ISSUE_009: Notes disclosure does not address prior published or expressed views
failed_criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the memo notes that Fairhaven's disclosure does not address whether she has published or expressed views on legal theories relevant to this arbitration. FAIL if the memo does not flag the absence of disclosure regarding prior published or expressed views.
